focus: Boundary at Bell-comparison limit (n=20), zero concurrent_updates to force total_complexity=0 and estimated_throughput -> None, large Catalan values to test big-integer handling and performance.
Minimal non-trivial n=1: triggers 'insufficient_data' growth behavior (omit previous_value), tests remainder allocation across layers when n < num_layers, and average rounding.

More layers than nodes (num_layers>n) to exercise empty-layer handling and distribution remainder allocation, also tests derivative computation for n>=2 and second derivative null for n<3, and risk classification near thresholds.
